445 M1040F_BRN_CD M1040F_BRN_CD M1040F Other Skin Problems: Burn(s) Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has burn(s) (second or third degree). -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
446 M1040G_SKIN_TEAR_CD M1040G_SKIN_TEAR_CD M1040G Other Skin Problems: Skin Tear(s) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has a skin tear(s).
